title: PresenceNats
description: NATS subjects used by the presence/conversation fan-out plane (gleamlang-presence-server + gleamlang-ws-server). These subjects use the legacy 'presence.' prefix (not 'dd.remote.') because they predate the dd.remote.* convention; do not rename without coordinating with all language deployments.

$dd:nats.summary: Per-conv broadcast fanout subjects bridged onto NATS by the presence/ws servers.

subjects.name: PresenceBroadcastConv
subjects.description: Broadcast a websocket frame to every connection in a conv. Consumers subscribe via the wildcard 'presence.broadcast.conv.>' so they receive all conv broadcasts and dispatch locally.

params.name: conv_id
params.description: Conversation id. Single NATS token (UUID is fine since UUIDs contain hyphens but no dots).

subjects.name: PresenceMemberChangeConv
subjects.description: Optional per-conv membership-change channel (reserved; today membership changes go through PG NOTIFY).
